core_customizations.name: formalChangesScript.xml — Migration artifact
core_customizations.description: Auto-generated migration script with 6084 lines of database DDL changes accumulated across client setup. Not intended for version control.
core_customizations.justification: Auto-generated artifact. Always eliminate on upgrade; the new version generates its own.

core_customizations.name: SystemService.java — deleteClient with data backup
core_customizations.description: Complete rewrite of SystemService adding a deleteClient() method that backs up client data to a restore.psql file via PostgreSQL CopyManager, disables constraints and autovacuum during deletion, and manages Quartz scheduler state. Adds UUID-based backup filenames and timestamp-based restore file naming.
core_customizations.justification: Generic client deletion with restore capability is valuable for any Etendo operator. The implementation uses standard PostgreSQL APIs (CopyManager) and Etendo scheduling. Propose to upstream with tests.
api_changes_applicable: Commons Lang 2→3: StringUtils import update required

core_customizations.name: AcctServer.java — Whitespace/indentation only
core_customizations.description: 678 lines of diff but examination shows only whitespace and indentation changes with no functional logic modifications.
core_customizations.justification: Pure formatting artifact with no business logic. Will cause constant merge conflicts on upgrade with no benefit.

core_customizations.name: C_INVOICELINETAX_INSERT — Argentina provincial tax (IIBB)
core_customizations.description: Adds Argentine Ingresos Brutos (provincial income tax) perception logic to invoice line tax calculation. Introduces variables for Salta and Mendoza province-specific perception types (BIC, BI50, BNA) querying from the smf.localizacion.argentina module fields on business partner.
core_customizations.justification: Argentina-specific provincial tax logic has no place in core. Belongs entirely in com.smf.localizacion.argentina module. Remove from core; the module should own this function hook.

core_customizations.name: C_INVLINE_CHK_RESTRICTIONS_TRG + C_INVOICELINE — ISEDITLINENETAMT workaround
core_customizations.description: Commented out the ISEDITLINENETAMT validation check in the invoice line restrictions trigger, and changed the column default from N to Y. Client workaround to allow editing line net amount directly.
core_customizations.justification: Client-specific workaround bypassing a validation. Must be removed; the preference or configuration for ISEDITLINENETAMT should be managed via standard Etendo configuration.

core_customizations.name: SL_Order_Amt.java — Commented-out price recalculation
core_customizations.description: Commented out the inplinenetamt price recalculation block in the sales order amount callout. Disables automatic recalculation when editing line net amount directly.
core_customizations.justification: Client-specific workaround suppressing standard behavior. Remove from core; the underlying business need (direct net amount editing) should be handled via standard Etendo feature flags.

core_customizations.name: Legacy HTML report/form templates (ad_reports, ad_forms, ad_actionButton)
core_customizations.description: Approximately 80 HTML template files across ad_reports/, ad_forms/, and ad_actionButton/ directories modified for layout or parameter adjustments. Includes dimensional analysis reports, Jasper filter forms, payment reports, shipping reports, and asset depreciation.
core_customizations.justification: Legacy SmartClient HTML templates are replaced entirely by the React UI. These templates serve the classic servlet-based UI only. None should be migrated; reports must be re-implemented in React or Jasper if still needed.

core_customizations.name: ob-pick-and-execute-grid.js — SmartClient P&E grid patch
core_customizations.description: 62-line patch to the classic SmartClient Pick-and-Execute grid JavaScript. Minor behavior or filter adjustment in the legacy UI.
core_customizations.justification: SmartClient JavaScript has no role in the React-based new UI. The Pick-and-Execute behavior is reimplemented from scratch in React (ProcessDefinitionModal.tsx).

core_customizations.name: PrintController.java + InitialClientSetup — Minor adjustments
core_customizations.description: PrintController.java (5+2 lines) and InitialClientSetup.java (1+1 lines) with trivial modifications, likely path adjustments or configuration constants.
core_customizations.justification: Trivial changes with no identified business value. Verify on upgrade that standard behavior is preserved.

custom_modules.name: Customizaciones Luján Agrícola
custom_modules.description: Massive (127K LOC, 170 Java files) all-in-one customization module for Luján Agrícola, an Argentine agricultural distributor. Covers: (1) Argentina AFIP e-invoicing (SendToAfipAndMail, CreateInvoiceHook), (2) Argentina IIBB/tax perception logic integrated with the Argentina localization module, (3) WebPOS extensions — BP/product/order/UOM/attribute master data, CUIT validation, last-price lookup, available-stock query, (4) MercadoLibre sales web service (receives orders, creates invoices), (5) SENASA-adjacent agricultural hooks (ToxicologicalStripHook for agrochemical labeling), (6) Custom AWO warehouse-picking algorithms (FEFO, priority/qty), (7) Background processes (costing reposition, recalculate floor stock, send pending invoices by email, close purchase orders), (8) Domain-specific custom tables: SMFCUS_AGROCHEMICAL_PRODUCT, SMFCUS_SOLICITUD_DESPACHO (dispatch requests), SMFCUS_CULTIVO_FINCA (farm/crop management), SMFCUS_DIFF_EXCHANGE_HEAD (exchange-rate differences), SMFCUS_LIQ_IIBB_YEAR (IIBB tax settlement), SMFCUS_CONTACTO, SMFCUS_TIPO_CONTACTO, (9) Accounting templates for invoice and inventory. Bundled runtime libs: pdfbox-2.0.19, opencsv-5.4, xml-apis-ext.
api_changes_applicable: Commons Lang 2→3: org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils → org.apache.commons.lang3 (MercadoLibreSalesWS.java and others)
log4j 1.x → log4j2: import org.apache.log4j.Logger → org.apache.logging.log4j (multiple files)
Hibernate Criteria API (OBCriteria) partially deprecated in 5.6 — review OBDal.getInstance().createCriteria() usage
AcctServer/AcctSchema classes modified in core — must retest AFIP accounting integration after core upgrade
itext removed (25.1.0): if pdfbox replaces itext, verify PDF generation still works
WebPOS classes (webpos/master/*, webpos/process/*): org.openbravo.retail.posterminal is unmaintained — all WebPOS extensions become dead code
custom_modules.recommendation: Do NOT attempt to port this module as-is. Perform a function-by-function audit to separate: (a) Argentina fiscal/tax logic — evaluate whether com.smf.localizacion.argentina should absorb it or if a separate maintained module is needed; (b) MercadoLibre WS — evaluate if still actively used before porting; (c) WebPOS extensions — eliminate entirely if WebPOS is being retired; (d) Domain custom tables (farming, dispatch, IIBB) — these represent Luján's proprietary data model and require full redesign for any SaaS migration. Minimum 30 days of dedicated development before any upgrade can proceed.

unmaintained_modules.name: Openbravo for Retail
unmaintained_modules.function: Core retail module: multi-terminal POS, session management, cash management, end-of-day close.
api_changes_applicable: Java 17 mandatory (26.1+), Gradle 8, Commons Lang 3, Hibernate 5.6
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: No official Etendo replacement. Assess whether WebPOS is still actively used. If yes, requires fork and full upgrade effort or migration to third-party POS. If no, eliminate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Web POS

unmaintained_modules.name: Localización Argentina
unmaintained_modules.function: Argentina fiscal localization: AFIP e-invoicing (CAE/CAEA), electronic invoice types (Facturas A/B/C/E/M), CUIT validation, IIBB perception (Ingresos Brutos provincial taxes), Ingresos Brutos register, withholding taxes (retenciones), and integration with AFIP web services.
api_changes_applicable: itext removed (25.1.0): Argentina PDF invoice generation must migrate to pdfbox or lowagie
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: No official Etendo Argentina localization exists. This module is critical for Argentine tax compliance (AFIP mandatory). Must either fork and maintain this module or commission a new one. Cannot eliminate without replacing AFIP integration. Highest priority unmaintained module.

unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows fate of com.smf.localizacion.argentina.

unmaintained_modules.function: Argentina localization extensions for WebPOS: CUIT validation at terminal, Argentine fiscal receipt printing.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Eliminate if WebPOS is retired. Retain and upgrade only if retail stack is forked.

unmaintained_modules.name: Integración con TrazaAgro de SENASA
unmaintained_modules.function: Integration with SENASA (Argentine national agricultural health service) TrazaAgro system for agricultural product traceability — required for agroquímico distributors.
api_changes_applicable: Javax XML SOAP API removed (must use standard JAX-WS)
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Critical for Argentine regulatory compliance in agroquímico sector. No replacement exists. Must fork and maintain or negotiate with SENASA for new API. Verify if TrazaAgro API endpoints are still active and compatible.

unmaintained_modules.name: Prestashop Integration
unmaintained_modules.function: Bidirectional integration with Prestashop e-commerce: product catalog sync, order import, stock sync.
api_changes_applicable: Prestashop REST API may have changed since v1.2.145
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Verify if Prestashop integration is actively used. If yes, fork and upgrade — the Prestashop API has evolved significantly. If no, eliminate. eu.practics appears to be an external vendor; contact them for support status.

unmaintained_modules.function: Client-specific customizations on top of the eu.practics.prestashop integration (Luján Agrícola-specific product attributes, Argentine pricing).

unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Verify if actively used. Good bundle candidate for freight-intensive businesses. Update for 25.4.x if retained.

unmaintained_modules.name: Java Extension Points
unmaintained_modules.function: Developer utility module providing Java extension point hooks (similar to Etendo's Event Handler framework but predates it).
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Superseded by Etendo's own Event Handler system. Verify dependencies and eliminate if nothing directly requires it.

unmaintained_modules.name: Openbravo HQL Query Tool
unmaintained_modules.function: Developer utility for running ad-hoc HQL queries directly against the database from the ERP UI.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Developer tool. Should not be installed in production SaaS. Eliminate.

unmaintained_modules.name: OpenCSV
unmaintained_modules.function: OpenCSV library wrapper module.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Library wrapper module. Gradle dependency management supersedes this approach. Eliminate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Javax XML SOAP API
unmaintained_modules.function: SOAP web services API (javax.xml.soap) wrapper module.
api_changes_applicable: Java 17: javax.* → jakarta.* namespace migration required
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: With Java 17 migration, javax.xml.soap becomes jakarta.xml.ws. Verify all SOAP-using modules handle this migration.

unmaintained_modules.name: Integration with Amazon S3
unmaintained_modules.function: Amazon S3 integration for storing Etendo files/attachments in cloud storage.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Verify if S3 integration is actively used. In SaaS context this is more relevant — evaluate for retention.

unmaintained_modules.name: Informes Financieros Avanzados (es_ES)
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translation for Etendo Advanced Financial Reports.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Translation module — check if official Etendo Financial Reports bundle includes this translation for 25.4.x.

unmaintained_modules.name: Product Selector Extension
unmaintained_modules.function: Extensions to Etendo's product selector: additional filters, columns, or behavior customizations.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Verify if a compatible version of this extension exists for Etendo 25.4.x.

unmaintained_modules.name: temp_modules
unmaintained_modules.function: Temporary modules directory — likely contains modules in development or staging.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Inspect contents and eliminate or promote to proper module status.

features.reason: 299 ventanas Maintain son el tipo de ventana más común. La estructura CRUD está implementada en React. Los gaps son comportamientos edge-case: multi-delete desde grid, Copy Record en tabs hijo, propagación del flag Active. Impacto alto por volumen.
features.title: Ventanas Maintain (tipo M)

features.reason: 42 ventanas Transaction en uso, críticas para operación diaria (facturas, órdenes, pagos). Bloqueadas parcialmente por DocAction (6 columnas) y Posted (31 columnas) — ambos con implementación parcial. Sin DocAction funcional no se puede completar/reactivar ningún documento.
features.title: Ventanas Transaction (tipo T)

features.reason: 13 ventanas de consulta read-only. Modo básico implementado. Gaps menores en toolbar (botones ocultos en modo Q) y comportamiento como popup selector.
features.title: Ventanas Query/Info (tipo Q)

features.reason: 65 ventanas Pick & Execute — el doble del promedio del portfolio. Incluyen flujos críticos de picking, confirmación de envíos, y recepción de mercancías. ProcessDefinitionModal.tsx maneja el caso estándar pero faltan: validación de campos inline mandatory, modo single-select (ismultirecord='N'), y forwarding de contexto del padre.
features.title: Pick and Execute (ventanas P&E)

features.reason: 6 columnas DocAction en ventanas Transaction. Funcionalidad core implementada pero los labels/nombres de las opciones del dropdown no se muestran correctamente (bug de presentación). Sin esto, usuarios no pueden completar, reactivar o anular documentos correctamente.
features.title: DocAction — Botón de documento

features.reason: 31 columnas Posted — el mayor count del portfolio. Guirao tiene integración con Argentina AFIP que genera asientos contables automáticos. La visualización de 3 estados (No Contabilizado / Contabilizado / Error) y el botón de re-post son críticos para el flujo contable.
features.title: Posted — Botón de contabilización

features.reason: 8 CreateFrom — permite crear facturas desde órdenes, recibos desde órdenes de compra, etc. Implementado como Process Definition. Pendiente validar que el modal muestra grid con checkboxes y calcula cantidades correctamente.
features.title: CreateFrom — Botón de creación desde documento

features.reason: 182 procesos Standard en Guirao — ejecución directa sin UI de parámetros. La mayoría deberían funcionar via API. Verificar que el routing desde botones en ventanas clásicas llega al servlet correcto en el nuevo UI.
features.title: AD_PROCESS Standard (tipo S)

features.reason: 230 procesos Manual — el count más alto del portfolio. Dependen de namespaces SmartClient/OB (OB.OpenClose.*, OB.OBWPL.*, etc.) que no existen en React. Decisión arquitectónica pendiente: iframe para legado o reimplementación. Sin resolver, ninguno de estos procesos funciona en React UI.
features.title: AD_PROCESS Manual JS (tipo M)

features.reason: 69 procesos background — el doble del promedio. Incluyen: SendToAfip (AFIP e-invoicing), CostingReposition, RecalcFloorStock, ClosePurchaseOrders, SendPendingInvoices. Funcionan via scheduler (Quartz) que es independiente del UI, pero la configuración y monitorización desde el nuevo UI debe verificarse.
features.title: Procesos Background (ISBACKGROUND=Y)

features.reason: 4 procesos Jasper. Con la actualización de JasperReports 6.0→6.17 en Etendo 25.1.x, los .jrxml existentes en com.smf.lujan.printing.reports deben validarse. El viewer de informes Jasper en React requiere verificación.
features.title: Procesos Jasper (ISJASPER=Y)

features.reason: 110 procesos de tipo reporte con HTML clásico. Estos renderizan HTML directamente desde servlets Java usando plantillas .html del SmartClient UI. En React no existe el mecanismo equivalente — todos deben reimplementarse como reportes Jasper, exportación Excel, o dashboards React.
features.title: Reportes HTML legacy (ISREPORT=Y)

features.reason: 166 Process Definitions P&E — muy alto. Procesamiento en masa de registros seleccionados. Implementado en ProcessDefinitionModal.tsx pero con gaps en validación inline y context forwarding.
features.title: OBUIAPP_PROCESS Pick & Execute

features.reason: 18 Process Definitions de tipo Manual JS — dependen de OB.* namespaces SmartClient que no existen en React. Cada uno requiere reimplementación individual o decisión de iframe. Auditar cuáles están en el módulo com.smf.lujan.customization vs módulos de sistema.
features.title: OBUIAPP_PROCESS Manual JS

features.reason: 27 Process Definitions con parámetros definidos en AD (OBUIAPP_PARAMETER). El modal de parámetros en React debe renderizar todos los tipos de referencia usados. Verificar que todos los tipos de campo de parámetros están soportados.
features.title: OBUIAPP_PROCESS con parámetros AD

features.reason: 2824 campos con display logic (201 usan @$SessionVar@). Bug activo documentado en /docs/troubleshooting/display-logic-implementation-en.md para la sintaxis @field_name@. Con este volumen de campos afectados, el impacto es sistémico — errores de visibilidad en prácticamente cualquier ventana.
features.title: Display Logic en campos

features.reason: 86 tabs con lógica de visibilidad condicional. Común en ventanas de documento (ej: tab Contabilidad visible solo si @Posted@='Y'). Impacto alto: tabs invisibles cuando deberían verse, o visibles cuando no deberían.
features.title: Display Logic en tabs

features.reason: 39 tabs completamente read-only. El comportamiento básico está implementado pero verificar que todos los controles de edición se deshabilitan correctamente.
features.title: Tabs read-only (ISREADONLY=Y)

features.reason: 95 columnas con callouts — alta para un cliente de este tamaño. Los callouts ejecutan lógica de negocio en tiempo real al cambiar un campo (cálculo de precios, validación de stock, carga de datos de proveedor). En React los callouts pasan por un endpoint REST; los callouts legacy SL_Order_Amt.java ya tienen lógica comentada en core. Requiere prueba exhaustiva de flujos de venta y compra.
features.title: Callouts

features.reason: 1004 columnas con read-only logic — determina si un campo es editable basado en condiciones de otros campos o estado del documento. El campo ISUPDATEABLE=N (6586 columnas) está implementado, pero la lógica dinámica via expresiones no está completamente validada.
features.title: Read-Only Logic en columnas

features.reason: 31 selectores OBUISEL custom con typeahead. El GenericSelector.tsx implementa el caso básico. Brecha crítica: 21 archivos OBUISEL_SELECTOR_FIELD (out parameters) — al seleccionar un valor puede poblar múltiples campos del formulario. Esta funcionalidad no está implementada.
features.title: Selectors OBUISEL

features.reason: 21 archivos OBUISEL_SELECTOR_FIELD con out parameters. En flujos de selección de producto/proveedor/cliente, el selector puebla automáticamente precio, descripción, condiciones de pago, etc. Sin esto, usuarios deben llenar manualmente campos que deberían auto-completarse, rompiendo el flujo de trabajo.
features.title: Selector Out Parameters

features.reason: 1 columna con referencia SelectorAsLink. El valor se muestra como enlace clickable que navega al registro referenciado. No implementado en React.
features.title: SelectorAsLink (ID: 80B16307)

features.reason: 0 tabs configuradas para mostrar grid inicial. No aplica.
features.title: Grid inicial (ISSHOWNINITIALGRIDMODE)

features.reason: 8 AD_FORM — formularios completamente customizados basados en HTML/JavaScript clásico (no Application Dictionary). Cada uno requiere reimplementación completa desde cero en React. Sin información de cuáles están en uso activo.
features.title: AD_FORM (formularios clásicos)

features.reason: 9 widget classes en el dashboard de Guirao (13 queries). Los widgets clásicos (OBKMO) tienen implementación React parcial. En SaaS, estos deben migrarse a componentes React o eliminarse.
features.title: Widgets de dashboard

features.reason: 114 grupos de campo distintos agrupando 1669 campos. Los field groups en React se renderizan como acordeones/secciones. Verificar que el layout visual es correcto con tantos grupos.
features.title: Field Groups (pestañas de campo)

features.reason: 199 campos configurados para aparecer en la barra de estado inferior. Implementación parcial en React. Verificar con Guirao que los campos clave (estado de documento, total, cliente) aparecen correctamente.
features.title: Barra de estado (Status bar fields)

features.reason: 2 alert rules activas. Bajo count — verificar si el sistema de alertas React muestra las notificaciones en el nuevo UI.
features.title: Alert Rules

features.reason: 98 tabs con filtros por defecto (42 HQLFILTERCLAUSE + 56 FILTERCLAUSE legacy). El brecha crítica del análisis: TabBuilder.java no envía hqlFilterClause al UI React. Sin estos filtros, tabs de consulta mostrarán todos los registros en lugar de los filtrados por defecto, con potencial impacto en rendimiento y usabilidad.
features.title: Tab Default Filters (HQL/SQL)

features.reason: 5694 columnas con valores por defecto. El UI React no lee el campo defaultValue del JSON de metadata — los defaults solo funcionan via round-trip server en modo NEW. Verificar que los flujos de creación de documentos aplican correctamente todos los defaults (fechas, organizaciones, almacenes).
features.title: Default Values (columnas con valores por defecto)

features.reason: 526 entradas de menú — menú extenso. 349 ventanas, 83 reportes, 40 process definitions, 33 procesos clásicos, 18 formularios externos, 3 OpenView. Los reportes clásicos (83) y formularios externos (18) son los elementos de mayor riesgo en el menú.
features.title: Menu y navegación

ui_readiness.description: Guirao Mayoristas on Etendo 23.2.0 has 419 windows, 230 Manual AD_PROCESS, 65 P&E windows, 18 Manual JS Process Definitions, and 166 P&E Process Definitions. The critical blockers are the 230 legacy Manual processes (OB.* namespaces do not exist in React), the 18 Manual JS Process Definitions (same issue), the 1004 read-only logic expressions (partial support), and active Display Logic @field@ syntax bug. The Argentina-specific modules (AFIP, WebPOS) introduce additional complexity beyond React UI readiness.
